item.title: Why Israeli Hackers Just Burned $90M of Crypto
item.author: Seytonic
item.content:encoded:
Get 20% off DeleteMe US consumer plans when you go to https://joindeleteme.com/seytonic and use promo code SEYTONIC at checkout. DeleteMe International Plans: https://international.joindeleteme.com/
0:00 Intro 0:16 Israeli Hackers Just Burned $90M of Crypto 2:45 DeleteMe (ad) 3:47 Archetyp BUSTED 6:18 GCHQ Intern Jailed 7:39 11 Year old Cyber Criminals 8:51 Sneaky Discord Hack
Sources: https://therecord.media/pro-israel-hackers-claim-attack-on-iranian-bank
https://operation-deepsentinel.com/

https://www.politie.nl/nieuws/2025/juni/10/08-police-identify-users-on-internationally-suspected-cyber-platform.html
https://research.checkpoint.com/2025/from-trust-to-threat-hijacked-discord-invites-used-for-multi-stage-malware-delivery/

item.title: Bruteforcing any Google Account's Phone Number
item.author: Seytonic
item.content:encoded:
0:00 Intro 0:13 Bruteforcing any Google Account's Phone Number 2:55 FED: Traitor in the DoD 4:56 FED: BidenCash Pwned 6:22 FED: North Korean Phone Exposed 7:49 Exposing Ransomware Gangs
Sources: https://brutecat.com/articles/leaking-google-phones?ref=404media.co
https://www.justice.gov/opa/pr/us-government-employee-arrested-attempting-provide-classified-information-foreign-government
https://www.justice.gov/usao-edva/pr/us-government-seizes-approximately-145-criminal-marketplace-domains https://therecord.media/bidencash-cybercrime-darknet-market-takedown-us-netherlands
